Model B

The most famous landmark in Paris that is not the Eiffel Tower is the Arc de Triomphe. This massive arch, built to commemorate victories in the French Revolution, is not as well-known as the Eiffel Tower but is a significant architectural landmark. You can learn more about its history and significance by visiting the Louvre's website.
